stages.title: Keep the chain and private RPC running
externalAccountsOrResources: Always-on Windows host, Linux host, or VPS
ownerMustDo: Choose the host that will stay online and keep the FlowChain node/control-plane running.

stages.title: Fill the ignored local owner env file
externalAccountsOrResources: Local ignored env file or service environment
ownerMustDo: Run the template command, fill real values only on the launch host, and point FLOWCHAIN_OWNER_ENV_FILE at that file.
ownerMustNotSend: Provider URLs that carry account tokens

stages.title: Expose repo-owned FlowChain RPC through a public HTTPS edge
externalAccountsOrResources: TLS edge, reverse proxy, or tunnel
ownerMustDo: Create DNS or a tunnel hostname for the FlowChain RPC edge.
Set exact allowed browser origins and a positive per-minute rate limit.

stages.title: Provision durable state backup storage
externalAccountsOrResources: Persistent local disk, mounted volume, or owner-managed backup directory
ownerMustDo: Create a writable persistent directory available to the FlowChain service process.
Keep the path local to the launch host or mounted as durable storage.

stages.title: Enable capped friends-and-family tester writes
externalAccountsOrResources: Owner password manager or secret store
ownerMustDo: Run the tester token setup command to create or preserve the raw bearer token in ignored local storage.
Store only its SHA-256 digest in the owner env file.
Choose a small positive per-send test-unit cap.
ownerMustNotSend: token hash together with the raw token

stages.title: Configure capped Base 8453 bridge pilot observation
externalAccountsOrResources: Base RPC provider or owner-operated Base node
ownerMustDo: Provide a Base chain 8453 HTTPS endpoint.
Provide deployed lockbox and supported-token addresses.
Choose the bootstrap from-block, confirmations, max deposit, total cap, and explicit capped-pilot acknowledgement.

stages.title: Release the external tester packet only after public gates pass
ownerMustDo: Share wallet/tester instructions only after the packet report marks external sharing ready.
Keep per-send caps low for the first pilot.
ownerMustNotSend: Raw tester token in GitHub or chat

stages.title: Run final no-secret production audit before public use
externalAccountsOrResources: None beyond the configured launch resources
ownerMustDo: Run the aggregate gates after all owner values are configured.
Do not announce public readiness until completionReady is true and the truth table has no owner blockers.
